heading: Assignment of leases
label: 316i Assignment of leases
text: The lessee may, with the approval of the Secretary, assign in whole or in part any lease, and to the extent of such assignment be relieved from any liability in respect of such lease, accruing subsequent to the effective date of such assignment.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , Territories and Insular Possessions.section 471i of Title 48
